title: Senior Fleet Manager at Swiggy Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Swiggy Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Swiggy Logistics! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Swiggy Logistics:
Swiggy Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
